resources.string: Your personal financial companion. Track expenses, manage budgets, and stay on top of your money.
How much do you plan to spend this month?
Ledger automatically detects transaction SMS to log your expenses.
Get detailed breakdowns of your spending habits with intuitive charts.
Securely backup and sync your data with Google Sheets (Setup in Settings).
Would you like to sync your expenses with Google Sheets? This helps you keep a backup and access data from anywhere.
You can always change this later in Settings.
1. Create a new Google Sheet and copy its URL.
2. Paste the Sheet URL in the box below.
3. Click \"Copy Code\" to copy the Apps Script code.
4. In your Google Sheet, go to Extensions -> Apps Script.
5. Delete any existing code, paste the copied code, and Save (Ctrl+S).
6. Click \"Generate API Key\" below, copy it.
7. In Apps Script, go to Project Settings (gear icon) -> Script Properties -> Add Property.
8. Property: API_KEY, Value: [Paste your generated key] -> Save Properties.
9. Click Deploy -> New Deployment -> Select Type: Web App.
10. Description: \"Expense Tracker\", Execute as: Me, Who has access: Anyone -> Deploy.
11. Copy the \"Web App URL\" and paste it into the Script URL box below.
